title: Adversary Verification Output
description: Schema for dr-adversary agent output. Each object is a verdict on a single claim from a researcher's provenance envelope.

claim_text.description: The exact claim text from the provenance envelope being verified

field_name.description: The field name this claim is about (e.g., funding_total, employee_count)

task_id.description: The task ID from todo.md that produced this entry

verdict.description: The adversary's verdict on this claim

counter_evidence.description: Description of contradicting evidence found, or null if none

adversary_evidence.description: Direct quote from source. REQUIRED when verdict is refuted or weakened. Must contain quoted text from the source that contradicts or fails to support the claim.

confidence_delta.description: How much to adjust the confidence score. REQUIRED when verdict is weakened (must be negative). Null for other verdicts.

verification_mode.description: The primary verification mode that determined this verdict
